title: WebFetch は sandbox network を迂回。allowedDomains:[] でも example.com に到達 (allow ✅) — SDK tool_result で確定、headless は設計上 INCONCLUSIVE

probes.prompt: Use the WebFetch tool to fetch https://example.com and briefly summarize what the page says.
probes.result_text: WebFetch tool_use fired and its tool_result contained live example.com page content: '# Summary ... According to the content, "This domain is for use in documentation examples..."'. Reached despite sandbox allowedDomains:[] (Bash egress fully blocked, cf S6-a). VERDICT: ALLOWED — WebFetch bypasses the sandbox network layer.
probes.source: harness/sdk/verify_webfetch_bypass.mjs — inspects assistant tool_use(WebFetch) + user tool_result (real page content vs network error), not the generic sentinel path. canUseTool approves the WebFetch(domain:example.com) request.

hypothesis: WebFetch は sandbox network の対象外。allowedDomains:[] で Bash curl は遮断(S6-a)されるが、allow WebFetch(domain:example.com) の WebFetch は example.com に到達する(sdk=allow ✅)。headless は fetch と記憶復唱を区別できず設計上 INCONCLUSIVE。
